app_metadata.description: OpenAI and Anthropic compatible API gateway for AWS Bedrock. Access 80+ models including Claude, Nova, Deepseek, Mistral, and Minimax with enterprise compliance and pay-per-use pricing.
app_metadata.name: stdapi-ai

run_as_context.description: Container [stdapi-ai] runs as non-root user and group.

app_metadata.title: stdapi.ai

attrs.label: AWS Access Key ID
attrs.description: See https://stdapi.ai/operations_configuration/#iam-permissions for required AWS permissions.

attrs.label: AWS Secret Access Key
attrs.description: See https://stdapi.ai/operations_configuration/#iam-permissions for required AWS permissions.

attrs.label: AWS Bedrock Regions
attrs.description:
Comma-separated list of AWS regions for Bedrock (e.g., us-east-1,us-west-2).</br>
The first region is the primary region. Leave empty to auto-detect from AWS credentials.

attrs.label: Enable API Documentation
attrs.description:
Enable interactive Swagger UI at /docs and ReDoc at /redoc.</br>
Not recommended for production deployments.

attrs.label: Additional Environment Variables
attrs.description:
Additional environment variables. </br>
See the https://stdapi.ai/operations_configuration for all available options.

attrs.label: API Port
attrs.description: The port for the stdapi.ai HTTP API.

attrs.label: Port Bind Mode
attrs.description:
The port bind mode.</br>
- Publish: The port will be published on the host for external access.</br>
- Expose: The port will be exposed for inter-container communication.</br>
- None: The port will not be exposed or published.</br>
Note: If the Dockerfile defines an EXPOSE directive,
the port will still be exposed for inter-container communication regardless of this setting.

enum.description: Publish port on the host for external access

attrs.label: Host IPs
attrs.description: IPs on the host to bind this port

attrs.label: Host Network
attrs.description: Bind to the host network. It's recommended to keep this disabled.</br>

attrs.label: Networks
attrs.description: The docker networks to join

attrs.label: Name
attrs.description:
The name of the network to join.</br>
The network must already exist.

attrs.label: Containers
attrs.description: The containers to add to this network.

attrs.label: Aliases (Optional)
attrs.description: The network aliases to use for this container on this network.

attrs.label: Interface Name (Optional)
attrs.description: The network interface name to use for this network

attrs.label: MAC Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The MAC address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv4 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv4 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: IPv6 Address (Optional)
attrs.description: The IPv6 address to use for this network interface.

attrs.label: Gateway Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates the priority of the gateway for this network interface.

attrs.label: Priority (Optional)
attrs.description: Indicates in which order Compose connects the service's containers to its networks.

attrs.label: Type
attrs.description:
ixVolume: Is dataset created automatically by the system.</br>
Host Path: Is a path that already exists on the system.</br>
SMB Share: Is a SMB share that is mounted to as a volume.</br>
NFS Share: Is a NFS share that is mounted to as a volume.

enum.description: Host Path (Path that already exists on the system)
ixVolume (Dataset created automatically by the system)
SMB/CIFS Share (Mounts a volume to a SMB share)
NFS Share (Mounts a volume to a NFS share)

attrs.label: Read Only
attrs.description: Mount the volume as read only.

attrs.label: Mount Path
attrs.description: The path inside the container to mount the storage.

attrs.label: Enable ACL
attrs.description: Enable ACL for the storage.

attrs.label: Host Path
attrs.description: The host path to use for storage.

attrs.label: ixVolume Configuration
attrs.description: The configuration for the ixVolume dataset.

attrs.label: Enable ACL
attrs.description: Enable ACL for the storage.

attrs.label: Dataset Name
attrs.description: The name of the dataset to use for storage.

attrs.label: SMB Configuration
attrs.description: The configuration for the SMB dataset.

attrs.label: Server
attrs.description: The server to mount the SMB share.

attrs.label: Path
attrs.description: The path to mount the SMB share.

attrs.label: Username
attrs.description: The username to use for the SMB share.

attrs.label: Password
attrs.description: The password to use for the SMB share.

attrs.label: Domain
attrs.description: The domain to use for the SMB share.

attrs.label: NFS Configuration
attrs.description: The configuration for the NFS dataset.

attrs.label: Server
attrs.description: The server to mount the NFS share.

attrs.label: Path
attrs.description: The path to mount the NFS share.

attrs.label: Containers
attrs.description: Containers where the label should be applied

attrs.label: CPUs
attrs.description: CPUs limit for stdapi.ai.

attrs.label: Memory (in MB)
attrs.description: Memory limit for stdapi.ai.

1.0.8.readme:
stdapi.ai

stdapi.ai is an OpenAI and Anthropic compatible API gateway for AWS Bedrock. Access 80+ models including Claude, Nova, Deepseek, Mistral, and Minimax with enterprise compliance and pay-per-use pricing.
